title: All of Government Cloud Sourcing Strategy
description: New Zealand government strategy for procuring secure and resilient cloud services across agencies. Establishes a consolidated Marketplace channel for IaaS and cloud services, introduces security tiering, supports multi-cloud and hybrid approaches, and incorporates Māori data sovereignty and Te Tiriti considerations into cloud procurement.
owner: Chief Digital Officer / Digital Government Team

source.page_title: All of Government Cloud Sourcing Strategy | NZ Digital government

change_log.author: auto-generated
change_log.summary: Initial guardrail created from external source. Defines NZ government cloud procurement strategy with focus on marketplace consolidation, security tiering, multi-cloud approach, and data sovereignty principles.
